segments.original_text: ストックカウントは2人

segments.text: And he's chaining fair off the bomb!
segments.original_text: そして爆弾を当ててからの空中前にも繋げていく

segments.text: Landing another bomb—and another—taking it to the air!
segments.original_text: さらに爆弾を当てて爆弾を当てて空中

full_text: Both at 2 stocks! And he's chaining fair off the bomb! Landing another bomb—and another—taking it to the air!
